document_id: 2016 IB-43 Self-Insured Workers‚Äô Compensation Corporation Gross Premium Tax Return Instructions

findings.description: Hyperlink properties were lost during conversion.
findings.evidence: In the PDF on pages 2, 3, and 4, URLs such as 'www.dornc.com' and 'http://www.dornc.com/downloads/insurance.html' are active, clickable hyperlinks (blue and underlined). In the HTML, the URL text is preserved accurately, but the actual <a> tags are missing, rendering them as plain text rather than clickable links.
